## Workspace.createWithSettings() method

Creates a new workspace with a pre-created settings manager. Used by platform initialization flow after settings have been loaded.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static createWithSettings(params: IWorkspaceCreateWithSettingsParams): Result<Workspace>;
```
